sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108958" key="u(poplatwniko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποπλᾰτωνικός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n108958.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a Platonic pretender,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0450.tlg001:14:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ephipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.2</biblScope> </bibl> (cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπὸ Πλάτωνα καὶ</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
